headline: Will President Trump reimposing his “blockade” of the Strait of Hormuz allow the U.S. to take control, or will it take something much more aggressive? Read more in today’s WSJ Politics Newsletter:
In Washington, Sen. Lindsey Graham was a power broker. In South Carolina, he was “Just Lindsey.” Now friends and neighbors are mourning the senator who never stopped coming home.

The third consecutive night of U.S. strikes on Iran is under way, a judge excoriates Trump over an IRS lawsuit, and Costco is the one thing everyone in America can agree on. Read more in today’s What’s News newsletter:
